Class Table

java.lang.Object
domain.Table
public class Table extends Object
Represents a table, containing a list of columns and rows. Provides operations to manipulate rows and columns and query structure.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Table(String name)
    Constructs a new Table with the given name.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    columnAllowsBlanks(int colIndex)
    Returns whether blanks are allowed in the column at the given index.
    Table
    copy()
    Returns a copy of the table with the same name.
    void
    createNewColumn()
    Creates a new column and adds a default value to every existing row.
    void
    createNewRow()
    Creates a new row using the current columns' default values and adds it to the table.
    void
    deleteRow(Row row)
    Deletes the specified row from the table.
    ColumnRepository
    getColumnRepository()
    Returns the column repository of this table.
    List<Column>
    getColumns()
    Returns the list of columns in the table.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of the table.
    List<Row>
    getRows()
    Returns the list of rows in the table.
    ColumnType
    getType(int colIndex)
    Returns the type of the column at the given index.
    void
    removeColumn(Column column)
    Removes the specified column from the table.
    void
    renameColumn(Column column, String name)
    Renames the given column.
    void
    setName(String newName)
    Sets the name of the table.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Table

      public Table(String name)
      Constructs a new Table with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the table, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is null

  • Method Details

    • createNewRow

      public void createNewRow()
      Creates a new row using the current columns' default values and adds it to the table.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of the table.
      Returns:
      the table name

    • copy

      public Table copy()
      Returns a copy of the table with the same name. The copy does not include rows or columns.
      Returns:
      a new Table instance with the same name

    • setName

      public void setName(String newName)
      Sets the name of the table.
      Parameters:
      newName - the new name to assign, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if newName is null

    • getColumnRepository

      public ColumnRepository getColumnRepository()
      Returns the column repository of this table.
      Returns:
      the column repository

    • getColumns

      public List<Column> getColumns()
      Returns the list of columns in the table.
      Returns:
      the list of columns

    • getRows

      public List<Row> getRows()
      Returns the list of rows in the table.
      Returns:
      the list of rows

    • getType

      public ColumnType getType(int colIndex)
      Returns the type of the column at the given index.
      Parameters:
      colIndex - the column index
      Returns:
      the column type

    • columnAllowsBlanks

      public boolean columnAllowsBlanks(int colIndex)
      Returns whether blanks are allowed in the column at the given index.
      Parameters:
      colIndex - the column index
      Returns:
      true if blanks are allowed; false otherwise

    • deleteRow

      public void deleteRow(Row row)
      Deletes the specified row from the table.
      Parameters:
      row - the row to delete, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if row is null

    • createNewColumn

      public void createNewColumn()
      Creates a new column and adds a default value to every existing row.

    • renameColumn

      public void renameColumn(Column column, String name)
      Renames the given column.
      Parameters:
      column - the column to rename, must not be null
      name - the new name to assign, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if either parameter is null

    • removeColumn

      public void removeColumn(Column column)
      Removes the specified column from the table.
      Parameters:
      column - the column to remove, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if column is null
